meaning: n.公园,停车场,炮场vt.停放(汽车等)
examples: The park is open during (the) daytime.
Families were strolling around the park.
Bill Justice is a park ranger at the Carlsbad Caverns National Park.
On warm days, Bostonians migrate to this popular park to sunbathe, picnic and feed waterfowl.
The important point is that many drivers prefer to parallel park themselves, thank you.
